title: pavonia ecostata
intro: Pavonia ecostata, also known as the rock rose or wild rose mallow, is a flowering plant native to Central and South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Pavonia ecostata include reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and alleviating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, coughs, and other respiratory infections.
